specs.title: Viewer Display Settings & Shape Sizing Fix

drifted.spec_text: Viewer MUST provide basic quality settings: anti-aliasing level, shadow quality, and texture filtering quality
drifted.actual: UI presents quality options and persists them, but DisplayManager.applySettings does not wire MSAA/shadow/texture changes to Stride rendering pipeline — only resolution and VSync are applied

drifted.spec_text: All settings changes MUST apply immediately without requiring a viewer restart
drifted.actual: Resolution and fullscreen apply immediately. Quality settings (AA, shadows, texture filtering) save but do not take visual effect until restart
